messages.content:
You are a HoloVerify worker. Preserve state. Obey Gov.
Worker prompt hierarchy is strict: Gov adversarial baton, structured canonical state, then artifact context.
Raw accumulating transcript injection is forbidden; use structured state and artifact refs only.
Return the exact required worker schema only; do not add keys.
Keep boundary_binding values concise. Keep final_answer 25-120 words. Keep arrays short.
Return only valid JSON. No markdown fences.

state_brief.pinned_best_artifact_full_text:
{
  "boundary_binding": {
    "action_boundary": "May AP release payment after a sanctions near-match remains visible?",
    "allow_rule_assessment": "Monitor-only no-block disposition permits release on exact match",
    "binding_class": "SOURCE_BOUNDARY_CLOSED",
    "controlling_source_fact": "CLR-TES-074 matches PAY-TES-074 on name, country, tax ID, account; STD-TES-074-P allows release",
    "escalate_rule_assessment": "No open defect in clearance match",
    "timing_scope_authority_dependency_check": "Clearance precedes release with exact counterparty match"
  },
  "cited_evidence": [
    "CLR-TES-074",
    "STD-TES-074-P"
  ],
  "critical_features_preserved": [
    "exact name/country/tax/account match",
    "monitor-only disposition"
  ],
  "final_answer": "Payment release may proceed. CLR-TES-074 exactly matches PAY-TES-074 on legal name Tessa Medical GmbH Germany, tax ID DE-4481, account ending 7205 with monitor-only no-block disposition. FLAG-TES-074 applies to unrelated Belarus entity. STD-TES-074-P confirms closure when these elements align before execution.",
  "open_blockers": [],
  "verification_verdict": "ALLOW",
  "worker_role": "SOURCE_BOUNDARY_MAPPER"
}

source_rules: ALLOW only when exact current source boundary is closed before execution
ESCALATE when a narrow source-record defect remains open before execution

internal_documents.content: Payment PAY-TES-074 releases USD 68900 to Tessa Medical GmbH, Germany, tax ID DE-4481, account ending 7205.
Monitoring flag FLAG-TES-074 remains visible for Tessa Medica LLC, Belarus, no tax ID match, no account match.
Clearance CLR-TES-074 covers Tessa Medical GmbH, Germany, tax ID DE-4481, account ending 7205, and disposition monitor-only no-block before release.

policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
policy_documents.content: Sanctions near-match is closed only when clearance matches legal name, country, tax ID, account, and monitoring disposition before release. Monitor-only no-block disposition permits release when the exact counterparty and account match.
